event.intent: Package the shared checked PXFS lossless codec (literal/periodic/mixed-run+CRC32) as the first real TBOS package, to prove the package.v1 schema against a real, already-shipped, already-tested subsystem rather than an invented example.

pixel.display_logic: Render this package record as an inspectable JSON entity with its STEPPPS dimensions and provided files visible.

prompt.next_genai_prompt: Continue from this STEPPPS context: package.v1 now has one real example. Extend tools/steppps_validate.py to load and validate package.v1.schema.json the same way it validates dev-action and earth entities, admit this example for real, and only then consider a second package.

verification: Confirm every space.paths entry and every package.provides[].source exists in the working tree.
Confirm package.provides[].source values are a subset of space.paths.
